title: Command Block Servers
description: Vanilla Minecraft Comannd blocks kinda suck, so I made better ones.
body: Vanilla Minecraft Command blocks kinda suck. The front and top faces aren't aligned, all the faces are off center, and neither of those can be fixed without making the texture ugly. So, I just remade it, with a whole new model and texture, turning it into a Server! This new texture can be used in builds, has none of the former problems, and is still animated!
